parents.subject: LU-19544 tests: skip conf-sanity/123G for older servers

commit.subject: LU-19137 ptlrpc: restore timer mode to absolute
commit.message:
LU-19137 ptlrpc: restore timer mode to absolute

Clock mode was incorrectly changed to relative when it is set to
expire at absolute time.

HPE-bug-id: LUS-12933
Fixes: 323a6672b7c0 ("LU-19137 build: Compatability updates for kernel v6.15")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ife8b30668f643d1c7c6524dfbd079fead5e35b39
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62456
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Nikitas Angelinas <nikitas.angelinas@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
